mapper.select: SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID AS id, DEPARTMENT_NAME AS name FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPARTMENT_NAME

SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID AS id, PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID AS parentId, DEPARTMENT_NAME AS name, LEVEL AS depth FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' START WITH PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR DEPARTMENT_ID = PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY DEPARTMENT_NAME

SELECT department_id FROM ( SELECT department_id FROM ( SELECT child.DEPARTMENT_ID AS department_id, child.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS department_name, 1 AS sort_order FROM DEPARTMENT parent JOIN DEPARTMENT child ON child.PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID = parent.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE parent.USE_YN = 'Y' AND child.USE_YN = 'Y' AND parent.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'IT사업본부' UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPARTMENT_ID AS department_id, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS department_name, 2 AS sort_order FROM DEPARTMENT d WHERE d.USE_YN = 'Y' AND d.PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DEPARTMENT parent JOIN DEPARTMENT child ON child.PARENT_DEPARTMENT_ID = parent.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE parent.USE_YN = 'Y' AND child.USE_YN = 'Y' AND parent.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'IT사업본부' ) ORDER BY sort_order, department_name ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 )
SELECT POSITION_ID AS id, POSITION_NAME AS name FROM POSITION WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDER, POSITION_ID), POSITION_NAME
